plan.command: google-business-profile-safe-cli account-management locations transfer --name locations/abc --source-account accounts/111 --destination-account accounts/222
risk_reasons: Location transfer changes account ownership for a location.
verification_plan: List source and destination account locations with readMask=name. Transfer succeeds only if location disappears from source and appears in destination.

rollback.notes: No automated rollback; preserve snapshots before apply for manual recovery.
